name: Surprise Cherry Squares
recipeInstructions:
Cream the butter and margarine until light and fluffy. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition. Add eggs one at a time, ensuring they are fully incorporated. Mix in flour until the dough is smooth.
Stir in vanilla and lemon extracts. Pour the batter into a 15x10x1-inch jellyroll pan, spreading evenly. Cut the batter into 24 squares using a small knife.
Place about 1 tablespoon of cherry pie filling in the center of each square. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until lightly browned and the batter has puffed around the filling. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before cutting into squares and removing from the pan.
